AUTH_SCOPE_MAP={DigitalIdentity:['USER_ID','USER_AVATAR','USER_NICKNAME'],ContactInformation:['PLAINTEXT_MOBILE_PHONE','PLAINTEXT_EMAIL_ADDRESS'],AddressInformation:['USER_ADDRESS'],PersonalInformation:['USER_NAME','USER_FIRST_SURNAME','USER_SECOND_SURNAME','USER_GENDER','USER_BIRTHDAY','USER_STATE_OF_BIRTH','USER_NATIONALITY'],KYCStatus:['USER_KYC_STATUS']};const function isAlipayWebView(){return Boolean(window.AlipayJSBridge||window.my||isAlipayUserAgent());}function normalizeBridgeError(method,response){const detail=(response===null||response===void 0?void 0:response.errorMessage)||(response===null||response===void 0?void 0:response.errorMsg)||(response===null||response===void 0?void 0:response.message)||(response===null||response===void 0?void 0:response.memo)||'Unknown bridge error.';const error=new Error(`Bridge method ${method} failed: ${detail}`);error.response=response;return error;}function hasBridgeError(response){return Boolean(response&&(response.error||response.success===false||response.errorCode||response.error==='DENIED'||response.error==='NO_PERMISSION'||response.errorMessage||response.errorMsg));}function callBridgeByMethod(method,params){return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{const bridge=window.my||window.AlipayJSBridge;if(!bridge){reject(new Error('Alipay bridge is not available.'));return;}if(typeof bridge[method]==='function'){bridge[method](Object.assign({},params,{success:response=>resolve(response),fail:response=>reject(normalizeBridgeError(method,response))}));return;}reject(new Error(`Bridge method ${method} is not available.`));});}function waitForBridgeReady(){let timeoutMs=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:10000;if(window.AlipayJSBridge||window.my){return Promise.resolve();}return new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{let settled=false;let timeout=setTimeout(()=>{if(settled){return;}settled=true;cleanup();reject(new Error('Alipay bridge readiness timed out.'));},timeoutMs);function onReady(){if(settled){return;}settled=true;clearTimeout(timeout);cleanup();resolve();}document.addEventListener('AlipayJSBridgeReady',onReady);pollTimer=setInterval(()=>{if(window.AlipayJSBridge||window.my){onReady();}},100);});}async function callBridgeWithFallback(candidates){const errors=[];for(const candidate of candidates){try{const result=await callBridgeByMethod(candidate.method,candidate.params);return{result,method:candidate.method,params:candidate.params};}catch(error){errors.push(error);}}const mergedError=new strictMethodOnly=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:false;const scopes=AUTH_SCOPE_MAP[authType];if(!scopes){throw new Error('Unsupported auth type.');}const methodName=`getUser${authType}AuthCode`;const candidates=[{method:methodName,params:{scopes,usage:usage||'Authorization requested by Toka Ripple.'}}];if(strictMethodOnly){return candidates;}for(const scopeNick of OAUTH_SCOPE_CANDIDATES){candidates.push({method:'getAuthCode',params:{scopeNicks:[scopeNick]}},{method:'getAuthCode',params:{scopes:[scopeNick]}});}return candidates;}export async function requestAuthCode(authType,usage){let strictMethodOnly=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:false;await waitForBridgeReady();const candidates=getAuthMethodCandidates(authType,usage,strictMethodOnly);const{result}=await callBridgeWithFallback(candidates);return result;}export function openPayment(paymentUrl){return callBridgeByMethod('pay',{paymentUrl});}export const alipayAuthScopes=AUTH_SCOPE_MAP;
